zh.Church Minshull, Cheshire, England: 英國爾邱奇 明書爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Dutton於1342年出生在英國爾達頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Dutton28歲，母親Eleanor Thornton26歲。他於1363年之前與Joan Minshull在英國爾邱奇 明書爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年在英國英格蘭爾達頓享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Dutton于1342年出生在英国爾達頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Dutton28岁，母亲Eleanor Thornton26岁。他于1363年之前与Joan Minshull在英国爾邱奇 明書爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年在英国英格兰爾達頓享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Dutton was born in 1342, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Dutton, was 28 and his mother, Eleanor Thornton, was 26. He married Joan Minshull before 1363, in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1386, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Dutton est né en 1342, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Dutton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Thornton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Minshull avant 1363, à Church Minshull, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1386, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Dutton 1342 in Dutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Dutton 28 und seine Mutter Eleanor Thornton 26. Er hat vor 1363 in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England Joan Minshull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Lui sposato Joan Minshull prima del 1363, nel Church Minshull, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1386, nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Duttonが1342年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Duttonは28歳，母Eleanor Thorntonは26歳であった。1363年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアチャーチ ミンシュルでJoan Minshullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Dutton(이)가 1342년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Dutton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Thornton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1363년 이전 영국 체실르 처르치 민슈에서 Joan Minshull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Dutton родился в 1342 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Dutton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Thornton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Minshull перед 1363 г. в местности чурч миншулл, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1386 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
